description_long: This is a classic, boxy all-terrain vehicle with a utilitarian design, featuring a khaki green body and a canvas-covered roof. The vehicle has four doors, black steel wheels with rugged tires, and a spare tire mounted on the rear. The front end is characterized by round headlights, a simple grille, and a flat hood with visible panel lines. The side mirrors are mounted on the doors, and the windows are tinted dark, obscuring the interior. The rear view reveals a basic bumper, tail lights, and additional utility fixtures, suggesting off-road readiness. The overall construction appears robust, suitable for both urban and rugged environments.
description: A khaki green, boxy all-terrain vehicle with a canvas roof, black steel wheels, and a utilitarian design, built for both urban and off-road use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the left profile, four doors, black wheels, and the canvas roof.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the spare tire, tail lights, and utility fixtures on the bumper.
description_view_2: Side view showing the right profile, similar to the left, with visible door handles and wheel details.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the round headlights, flat hood, grille, and front bumper.
attribute_tire_tread_pattern: The tires have a blocky, all-terrain tread pattern designed for traction on both paved and unpaved surfaces.
